description: Building end-to-end ML pipelines for NLP classification and anomaly detection. Reduced inference latency by 40% via ONNX export and INT8 quantization.
Developed churn prediction models (XGBoost, LightGBM) with 89% AUC. Automated weekly reporting dashboards, saving 8+ man-hours/week.
Contributed to computer vision research on medical image segmentation. Implemented U-Net variants; experiments on university GPU cluster.
Delivered data analysis and visualisation for 8+ clients. Built automated ETL pipelines reducing client manual effort by 70%.
